title: What I use for my website, where I learned and if I use ads on it - Request

transcript.text: This one is from Alex Elntolosep.
He's the person who asked me to do a video about narcissism.

Where did you learn to build a site?
Are you going to place some Google adverts on your site
To try to get some money from it?
What do I use to administer my site?
I bought the new updated version like three years ago.
Um, and I try to only get the upgraded version when I have to
Because they redesign the stuff and I have to relearn.
But, you know, the new way that they do it is usually better anyways.
You just have to get used to it.
Um, back in like 2004 or something like that,
I, um, I, uh, there was this website called, uh,
I don't even remember what it's called.
Some kind of HTML tutorial website.
And I just learned, I actually learned doing HTML websites
Before I even knew there were WYSIWYG websites.
Like Dreamweaver, what you see is what you get,
Where you just work on the site.
So I was making websites only with coding, dude.

Until a friend told me there was just such thing as WYSIWYG.
See, I was in Chile and nobody I knew
And then this kid who did know about computers
I don't know why he didn't tell me in the beginning.
That wasn't one of his personality traits, I guess.
Now how did I learn after that?
Well, Dreamweaver works pretty much the same
Or, which is really similar to, you know,
Before they invented computers, Word processors.

And I already knew how to do HTML,
I'm good enough to do, you know,
I, but the stuff that I do
Where you have the lines go through,

That I'm going to have to get,
